description: Input parameters for engineering artificial allosteric protein switches using machine learning-designed ligand-binding domains

protein_design_methodology.design_principle: Conformational entropy modulation without global conformation change

ligand_binding_domain_design.receptor_selection: Natural single-domain proteins with small-molecule ligands
ligand_binding_domain_design.conformational_requirement: Domains lacking global conformation changes upon ligand binding
ligand_binding_domain_design.design_strategy: Convert to efficient biosensor receptors through ML optimization

example_natural_domain.name: Anticalin
example_natural_domain.binding_mechanism: Loop rearrangement with minimal global change

switch_configuration_options.description: Receptor and reporter in single protein

biotechnology_applications.cellular_engineering: Steroid-dependent antibiotic resistance in E. coli
